title: I upload art once and earn royalties every month #printondemand
spoken_script:
# PASSIVE INCOME FROM DESIGNS

So I uploaded twenty designs to Redbubble months ago. And guess what? They're still selling every single week.

Here's the crazy part: I don't hold inventory. I don't ship anything. I don't deal with customers. Redbubble does all of it.

I literally upload a design once. Then I sit back and collect royalties whenever someone buys it. T-shirts, phone cases, mugs, posters, stickers—all from that one upload.

But here's how I'm actually making more money: I'm listing these same files on Teepublic and Society6. Same designs. Double the platforms. Double the income.

The complete step-by-step guide on how to set this up is in the link in my bio. Go check it out.
